directive_handled.title: Investigate + propose optimizations to curmudgeon's pre-review dispatcher
directive_handled.outcome: PROP-021 authored — monitor/tinker/proposals/PROP-021-curmudgeon-dispatcher-optimization.json (~70KB, all 8 deliverable structure sections + all 5 open design questions answered).
directive_handled.directive_status_after_run: completed (status field transitioned per DIRECTIVE-LIFECYCLE additive-edit exception; completed_at, completed_by_run, prop_id_authored fields appended).

findings.topic: PROP-020's success creates clear template for PROP-021
findings.evidence: compute-drift-audit.js exists (monitor/scripts/, 11260 bytes); drift-audit.json is being refreshed (generated_at 2026-05-05T20:52:12Z, 20 candidates); structure-integrity.md §7g is in place; recent curmudgeon reviews (WIN-028.c3, WIN-050.c3) have trigger:'change-detected' with change_summary referencing the drift-audit. The PROP-020 pattern (deterministic Node script + integrity precompute + curmudgeon thin-read + fallback to in-prompt scan) is now battle-tested. PROP-021 applies it to Priorities 1/2/0c2/4 with the same shape.
findings.recommendation: Operator review PROP-021. The maintenance pattern is identical to PROP-020 — same risk profile, same rollback story, same tinker Mode 3 audit cadence.

findings.topic: State-file bloat is the single biggest dispatcher-time cost source
findings.evidence: priority-queue.json: 50KB total / 981 bytes live state / 45KB history bloat (175 popped items). human-notes.json: 39KB total / 0 pending notes (all 9 consumed) / 2-byte pending serialization. Dispatcher-time state-file reads total ~46K tokens of input on most runs to confirm 'no work' before falling to Priority 3.
findings.recommendation: PROP-021 Option A (precompute) bypasses these source files via the slim dispatcher-state.json artifact. PROP-021 Option C (state-file hygiene) is deferred but could be a separate cleanup-PROP later if Option A's bypass isn't enough.

findings.topic: Pre-review prose loaded every run despite firing on <10% of runs
findings.evidence: Step 8a Batch triage gate (lines 121-148 of curmudgeon.md, ~4KB), Step 0c coverage-already-exists exception (lines 152-157, ~1KB), Step 0c2 major-change audit (line 159, ~1.5KB) — all loaded into LLM context on every run regardless of whether queue has items / notes are pending / changes need audit. With current state (queue empty, all notes consumed, recent changes are substantive/automated), these procedures fire on a small fraction of runs.
findings.recommendation: PROP-021 Option B (prompt slim) moves these conditional blocks into reference files loaded only when triggered. Saves ~3.2K input tokens per run.

findings.topic: Stranded patches not enumerated this run — recommend next non-directive run executes Mode 1 quick check
findings.evidence: PROP-016 Mech A audit step (curmudgeon.md tinker.md dispatcher Pre-flight) was not run this cycle because the directive override took precedence. Stranded patches >24h old need operator attention.
findings.recommendation: Next non-directive tinker run (likely tomorrow's 10:30 AM cron) should execute the Mode 1 quick check for stranded patches and report any aged-out items.

summary: Mode 4 directive run. Authored PROP-021 (curmudgeon dispatcher optimization) per DIRECTIVE-20260505-005. The PROP applies the PROP-020 precompute-and-hand-off pattern to Priorities 1/2/0c2/4: a deterministic Node script (compute-curmudgeon-dispatcher-state.js) writes monitor/integrity/curmudgeon-dispatcher-state.json (~3-5KB) summarizing pre-resolved priority state; curmudgeon's setup phase invokes the script via bash (~150-200ms wall-clock, ~0 LLM tokens) and reads the slim artifact instead of priority-queue.json (50KB), human-notes.json (39KB), tracker.json's holistic_checks (in 65KB file), and the changes/ scan. Combined with a prompt slim (move PROP-009 detail / Step 8a batch triage / Step 0c coverage-exception / Step 0c2 major-change audit prose into reference files loaded only when triggered), the dispatcher-phase input drops from ~51K tokens to ~3.5-6.5K tokens — ≥70% reduction expected. The directive's 5 open design questions are all answered. PROP-018 (sync manifest) interaction: independent rollout. Status: PROP authored; directive marked completed; operator authorization required for implementation (do_not_implement clause respected — no scripts created, no prompts modified).
